title: San Antonio Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting San Antonio with a Z-Score of +4.23. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in San Antonio is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.8 GG, are expected to continue for the next few days, with humidity levels at 47% and wind speeds of 10.9 km/h. 
 The situation is being closely monitored, with authorities urging residents to take necessary precautions to stay safe.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
